sources.title: Heroes Shed No Tears (MARTIAL ARTS ACTIONFILM of SHAW BROTHERS films German complete 2023)

metadata.Plot: The Thai government hires a group of Chinese mercenaries to capture a powerful drug lord from the Golden Triangle. The mercenaries manage to capture the drug lord, but soon find themselves pursued by his forces, and the forces of a bitter Thai officer. The Chinese mercenaries are vastly outnumbered, and as their numbers begin to dwindle, their desperation pulls them into a corner as their enemies close in on them.
metadata.Writer: Peter Ho-Sun Chan, Leung-Chun Chiu, John Woo
metadata.Actors: Eddy Ko, Ching-Ying Lam, Philippe Loffredo
